svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="5" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Navigation Design</text>
  
  <!-- Navigation Bar -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="300" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Navigation Bar
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Menu Items -->
  <rect x="80" y="120" width="80" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Home
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="180" y="120" width="80" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Products
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="280" y="120" width="80" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Contact
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Dropdown Menu -->
  <rect x="180" y="160" width="80" height="80" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="185" y="170" width="70" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="185" y="195" width="70" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="185" y="220" width="70" height="20" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Arrow indicating dropdown -->
  <path d="M220 155 L220 160" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Breadcrumbs -->
  <rect x="60" y="270" width="300" height="30" fill="#E3F2FD" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Home > Products > Category
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="80" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Menu Items
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="220" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Dropdown
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Navigation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Breadcrumbs
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
